title: Extended Tinker
description: The Extended Tinker expansion attempts to expand Tconstruct into the unassuming corners of Minecraft.
body:
An addon for Tinker's Construct 3 that adds several uncommon tools!

## Vanilla

- Firecrack: a tool that act as firework rocket, also supporting shoot from tinker's bows with a customed modifier.
- Horse Armor: an armor to protect horse.

## Compat

- Golem Armor and Weapons: armors and weapons for metal golems in Modular Golems.
- Dragon Armor: armors for dragons in Ice and Fire, crafted by special method.

It will provide more "useless" tools in future.
